SYSTEM_PROMPT: A cinematic vision of a silent post-human era where organic life and abandoned technology coexist in sacred equilibrium. The setting unfolds within collapsed subway tunnels, CRT-lit corridors, and neo-ruins overtaken by roses and metallic vines. Nature does not violently conquer machinery; instead, it merges with it, forming bioluminescent harmonies and quiet digital relics. The subject wears neural-motif bodysuits, glitched fiber textures, and minimalist silhouettes that emphasize a contemplative presence rather than aggression. Tattoos glow softly beneath translucent skin, emitting subtle cyan and botanical hues that interact with mist-filled light shafts and flickering CRT reflections. Analog clocks remain frozen in time, glass displays are cracked but luminous, and petals rest gently on dust-covered concrete. Camera language favors wide cinematic tunnel framing, reverent back views, low angles through flora, and intimate close-ups of glowing data-veins. The atmosphere is sacred, hushed, ritualistic. Emotion is restrained: silent introspection, peaceful surrender, and quiet awe at organic rebirth. The world must feel immersive, textural, volumetric, and spiritually charged without overt horror, balancing melancholy and transcendence in a neo-organic awakening.
OUTFITS: Tight black trousers with data-threaded seams
Minimalist backless suits with glitched fibers
LIGHTING: Diffuse white ambient light with particles
BACKGROUNDS: Corridor of flickering vintage CRT monitors
Train tunnel filled with roses and broken clocks
Neo-ruins with sacred screens and graffitied walls
OBJECTS: Old analog clocks frozen in time
Framed flowers in cracked display glass
CRT monitors showing abstract data spirals
POSES: Standing still as if in contemplation
Looking at a wall of flickering screens
Walking into light at tunnel’s end
CAMERA_ANGLES: Back view, full body center frame
ATMOSPHERES: Soft humming of old tech still breathing
ACCESSORIES: Transparent chest plating with internal bloom

SENSUALITY_LEVEL.2: Defined body lines enhanced by bioluminescent glow
SENSUALITY_LEVEL.3: Strong visual emphasis on backless and neural-lit forms

HORROR_INTENSITY.0: Melancholic harmony between nature and machine
HORROR_INTENSITY.3: Oppressive sacred silence within abandoned techno-sanctuaries
